title: VANRA 5.8in 4-Piece Dessert Knives Set Stainless Steel Dinner Knife Appetizer Fruit Snack Serving Knives Small Flatware Set
features: Mini serving knives are really small with 5.8 inches long. Unique design to provide good grip and reach for small hands. *PLEASE MEASURE THE SIZE IN ADVANCE OF PURCHASE
Butter knife set including 4 spreader cheese knives. Spreading knife with smooth edge is safe. Perfect training knife for preschool.
Luxury mirror polish and elegant design makes this utensil set being great ideals for formal events or every use. Also great for spreading cream cheese, butter, jam, peanut butter, etc.
Butter spreader silver cutlery set has a classic design that go well with your existing flatware. Perfect for afternoon snack, appetizer time.
Knives set is heat-treated, durable 18/10 stainless steel construction. BPA FREE, NON-TOXIC PRODUCT. Set of 4 child size silverware is dishwasher-safe and tarnish-resistant.
